quorum_status: POST /api/vault/attest returned HTTP 404 (Next.js not-found HTML); quorum_status not returned. Supplemental GET /api/quorum/state 200 — state_machine.quorum_state=substrate_pending, vault_block_state=attested, candidate in_flight seal-C-317-095, integrity.source=kv-live, cycle=C-317.

findings.detail: Read docs/catalog/heartbeats/2026-05-20T11-06-58Z-atlas.json — gi=0.9 mode=green source=kv; 12 anomaly strings; seed_attempted=true seed_result="200 OK"; sustain_eligible=true; kv_keys show ECHO_STATE false (expected gap) and core GI/SIGNAL/MIC lanes present.

GET https://mobius-civic-ai-terminal.vercel.app/api/signals/micro 200 — composite≈0.664 errors=9; each ATLAS-listed lane still elevated or hard-error (e.g. OpenAQ, NWS, ArXiv, data.gov, UN, OECD, npm, self-ping, Cloudflare, Fastly, crt.sh, FRED). Micro embedded cycle C-306 vs lane/integrity C-317 (metadata drift).
GET /api/integrity-status 200 — source kv (not mock); global_integrity 0.81 vs ATLAS catalog gi 0.9; gi_verified=false; degraded=true; terminal_status nominal; cycle C-317 matches heartbeat.
GET /api/epicon/candidates 200 — count 0; no candidates, verification skipped (no POST /api/zeus/verify or /api/epicon/publish).
POST /api/vault/attest HTTP 404 — route not present on deployed surface; quorum attestation body not accepted.
POST /api/agents/journal HTTP 502 — ok=false error=github_403 mirrored_to_kv=false; substrate canon write blocked.

recommendation: Treat ATLAS catalog headline GI (0.9) as stale versus live lanes: KV integrity-status 0.81 and micro composite 0.664 both sit materially lower with widespread third-party hard failures. integrity source is kv (not mock), so KV seed is not the failure mode. Reconcile micro sweep cycle metadata (C-306) with CURRENT_CYCLE (C-317). Deploy POST /api/vault/attest or document the supported C-298 quorum registration path. Restore GitHub token permissions for agent journal dual-write.
